'''Sayn Ta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Clone Master/Legends|Master Cloner]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

==Biography==
Sayn Ta was the scientist who was given the duty to create a [[Kaminoan nano-virus vaccine|vaccine]] against the deadly [[Kaminoan nano-virus]], a virus created to decimate the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] when the first clones died a few months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. Just after the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] left her laboratory, she was killed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] Kaminoan [[Kuma Nai]] that had developed the nano-virus with an overdose of the substance.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|14|Tides of Terror}} {{1st}}
